translations.ko: 우리는 이 담을 함께 쌓고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在一起砌这堵墙。
translations.he: אנחנו בונים את הקיר הזה ביחד.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang cùng nhau xây bức tường này.
translations.hi: हम यह दीवार मिलकर बना रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami sedang membangun tembok ini bersama.
translations.sv: Vi bygger den här muren tillsammans.
translations.ja: 私たちはこの塀を一緒に作っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; impersonal 3rd person singular (often 'one/we') acting as the subject.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular of 'bâtir', agreeing with 'On'.
Demonstrative determiner; masculine singular, modifies 'mur'.
Common noun; masculine singular; direct object of 'bâtit'.
Adverb; 'together'; modifies the verb phrase.

sentences.target: Nous bâtissons une cabane pour les enfants.
sentences.reading: /nu batisɔ̃ yn kaban puʁ lez ɑ̃fɑ̃/

translations.fr: Nous bâtissons une cabane pour les enfants.
translations.ipa: /nu batisɔ̃ yn kaban puʁ lez ɑ̃fɑ̃/
translations.en: We’re building a hut for the kids.
translations.es: Estamos construyendo una cabaña para los niños.
translations.de: Wir bauen eine Hütte für die Kinder.
translations.it: Stiamo costruendo una capanna per i bambini.
translations.ko: 우리는 아이들을 위해 오두막을 짓고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为孩子们建一间小屋。
translations.yue: 我哋為小朋友起一間小屋。
translations.pt: Estamos construindo uma cabana para as crianças.
translations.tr: Çocuklar için bir kulübe inşa ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang xây một túp lều cho bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: We bouwen een hut voor de kinderen.
translations.hi: हम बच्चों के लिए एक झोपड़ी बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Χτίζουμε μια καλύβα για τα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Vi bygger en hytte til barna.
translations.id: Kami sedang membangun sebuah gubuk untuk anak-anak.
translations.sv: Vi bygger en koja åt barnen.
translations.da: Vi bygger en hytte til børnene.
translations.ja: 子どもたちのために小屋を作っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; 1st person plural.
Main verb; present indicative, 1st person plural of 'bâtir', agreeing with 'Nous'.
Indefinite determiner; feminine singular, modifies 'cabane'.
Common noun; feminine singular; direct object of 'bâtissons'.
Preposition; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating purpose/beneficiary.
Definite article determiner; plural, modifies 'enfants'.
Common noun; plural; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Je veux bâtir une vie plus saine.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø batiʁ yn vi ply sɛn/

translations.fr: Je veux bâtir une vie plus saine.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø batiʁ yn vi ply sɛn/
translations.en: I want to build a healthier life.
translations.es: Quiero construir una vida más saludable.
translations.de: Ich möchte ein gesünderes Leben aufbauen.
translations.it: Voglio costruire una vita più sana.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想打造更健康的生活。
translations.yue: 我想打造更健康嘅生活。
translations.ru: Я хочу создать более здоровую жизнь.
translations.pt: Quero construir uma vida mais saudável.
translations.he: אני רוצה לבנות חיים בריאים יותר.
translations.tr: Daha sağlıklı bir yaşam kurmak istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn xây dựng một cuộc sống lành mạnh hơn.
translations.ar: أريد أن أبني حياة أكثر صحة.
translations.nl: Ik wil een gezonder leven opbouwen.
translations.hi: मैं अधिक स्वस्थ जीवन बनाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να χτίσω μια πιο υγιεινή ζωή.
translations.nb: Jeg vil bygge et sunnere liv.
translations.id: Saya ingin membangun kehidupan yang lebih sehat.
translations.sv: Jag vill bygga ett mer hälsosamt liv.
translations.ro: Vreau să construiesc o viață mai sănătoasă.
translations.da: Jeg vil bygge et sundere liv.
translations.ja: もっと健康的な人生を築きたいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; 1st person singular.
Main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular of 'vouloir'; modal-like, selects an infinitive complement.
Verb in infinitive; complement of 'veux'.
Indefinite determiner; feminine singular, modifies 'vie'.
Common noun; feminine singular; direct object of 'bâtir'.
Adverb; degree marker 'more', modifies 'saine'.
Adjective; feminine singular, modifies 'vie'.

sentences.target: Vous bâtissez votre plan trop vite.

translations.fr: Vous bâtissez votre plan trop vite.
translations.en: You’re building your plan too fast.
translations.es: Están elaborando su plan demasiado rápido.
translations.de: Sie erstellen Ihren Plan zu schnell.
translations.it: State elaborando il vostro piano troppo in fretta.
translations.ko: 여러분은 계획을 너무 빨리 세우고 있어요.
translations.ru: Вы слишком быстро разрабатываете свой план.
translations.pt: Vocês estão elaborando seu plano rápido demais.
translations.he: אתם מכינים את התוכנית שלכם מהר מדי.
translations.vi: Các bạn đang xây dựng kế hoạch của mình quá nhanh.
translations.nl: Jullie stellen jullie plan te snel op.
translations.uk: Ви надто швидко складаєте свій план.
translations.hu: Túl gyorsan állítjátok össze a terveteket.
translations.hi: आप अपनी योजना बहुत जल्दी बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Καταρτίζετε το σχέδιό σας πολύ γρήγορα.
translations.nb: Dere lager planen deres for fort.
translations.id: Kalian menyusun rencana kalian terlalu cepat.
translations.sv: Ni tar fram er plan för snabbt.
translations.da: I laver jeres plan alt for hurtigt.
translations.ja: あなたたちは計画を作るのが速すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; 2nd person plural (or formal singular).
Main verb; present indicative, 2nd person plural of 'bâtir', agreeing with 'Vous'.
Possessive determiner; singular, modifies 'plan'.
Common noun; masculine singular; direct object of 'bâtissez'.
Adverb; degree marker 'too', modifies 'vite'.
Adverb; manner 'quickly'; forms an adverbial phrase 'trop vite' modifying the verb.
